ItacPersonItem.Notes: Martirano`s presence among the Introanti, along with other Neapolitans, such as Sanseverino, Galeota, Alfonso D`Avalos, and Giovanni Antonio Muscettola, is suggested by E. Valeri, in `Dizionario Biografico degli Italiani`
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
